use_for: tasks that need current external knowledge
vision inspection when accuracy risk is acceptable

rules: keep live chat context for intent, current plan, and active blockers only
move stable facts to MEMORY.md or memory/preferences, memory/decisions, and memory/system
move long reports and implementation notes to docs/ instead of keeping them in chat
summarize tool output before continuing when output is longer than the active decision needs
prefer file references over pasting full files into chat
start a fresh task artifact when context exceeds the compression trigger
overflow_recovery: write a compact handoff summary before continuing
persist current state in docs/ or memory/system
reload only the specific files needed for the next step
resume from committed artifacts instead of reconstructing from chat history

behavior: switch to local mode for compact reasoning and local file work
avoid internet-current claims unless a search tool is available
split long tasks into smaller artifacts before local processing
record degraded-mode decisions in memory/decisions when they affect architecture
skip local-only private summarization until Ollama or GPU status recovers

hybrid.default: API orchestrates; Ollama handles compact/private subwork when VRAM is safe.
local_preflight: check GPU memory before local LLM work
avoid loading local models if used VRAM would exceed 9728 MiB
prefer qwen3.5:4b or qwen3.5:2b when other GPU workloads are active

api.default: API-first for orchestration, long context, and high reliability. Ollama remains available for private low-risk work.

local.default: Ollama-first for compact/private work. API remains fallback for long context, external knowledge, or complex synthesis.
